children.heading: Employment and reemployment rights of members of uniformed services
children.label: a Employment and reemployment rights of members of uniformed services
A
children.text: discriminate, within the meaning of subsections (a) and (b) of , against an eligible employee;section 4311 of title 38

children.label: B
children.text: deny to an eligible employee reemployment rights within the meaning of sections 4312 and 4313 of title 38; or

children.label: C
children.text: deny to an eligible employee benefits within the meaning of sections 4316, 4317, and 4318 of title 38.

children.label: A
children.text: the term “eligible employee” means a covered employee performing service in the uniformed services, within the meaning of , whose service has not been terminated upon occurrence of any of the events enumerated in ,section 4303(13) of title 38section 4304 of title 38

children.label: B
children.text: the term “covered employee” includes employees of the Government Accountability Office, and

children.label: C
children.text: the term “employing office” includes the Government Accountability Office.

children.heading: Remedy
children.label: b Remedy
children.text: The remedy for a violation of subsection (a) shall be such remedy as would be appropriate if awarded under .section 4323(d) of title 38

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Board shall, pursuant to , issue regulations to implement this section.section 1384 of this title

children.heading: Agency regulations
children.label: 2 Agency regulations
children.text: The regulations issued under paragraph (1) shall be the same as substantive regulations promulgated by the Secretary of Labor to implement the statutory provisions referred to in subsection (a) except to the extent that the Board may determine, for good cause shown and stated together with the regulation, that a modification of such regulations would be more effective for the implementation of the rights and protections under this section.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), subsections (a) and (b) shall be effective 1 year after .January 23, 1995

children.heading: Government Accountability Office and Library of Congress
children.label: 2 Government Accountability Office and Library of Congress
children.text: This section shall be effective with respect to the Government Accountability Office and the Library of Congress 1 year after transmission to the Congress of the study under .section 1371 of this title
